description: Composition Black and white plaid shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid-sleeve button cuffs, has a spread collar, buttoned chest placket, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, embroidered lettering over the left chest pocket and a curved hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak, wring or twist Dry in shade Fold and stack to maintain shape Moderate warm iron Do not iron on print or embroidery The patch pockets on the chest and embroidered brand detailing adds rugged styling to this shirt from spykar, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
